entry.title: Re: Add Transactional Behavior to Your Core Data Services + debug Behavior implementation
entry.content: Have you checked https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/adt-abap-debugger-what-to-do-if-your-program-does-not-stop-at-breakpoints/ba-p/13397571 ?

entry.title: MDG-M Standard Fields are not editable
entry.content:
Hello,

I am experiencing an issue with UIBB Standard Fields. In the Basic Data section under General Data, I can maintain certain fields. However, in the Plant: Purchasing section under General Data, all fields are read-only. I have already checked the UIBB settings, and they appear to be correct.

I have included screenshots comparing a field from Basic Data and a field from Plant: Purchasing.

Thank you!

Best regards,

ReiBasic DataMaterial Type FieldPlant PurchasingPurchasing Group Field

entry.title: Re: Restore deleted chart of accounts
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   

as you can see there is select all option in OBD4                                                                                                                                                                                      -  in the screenshot attached below these are the records that have been deleted and i want to recreate them but in order to do that there a lot of accounts and as you can see in the image i need also (From account and To account ) Fields so if you can guide me if there is a way i can get(export) this data in excel of word  format

entry.title: Re: Fetch Sales Org and Currency in Subscription Order us...
entry.content:
Hello,

This is not exactly my area of expertise, but your question attracted my attention, so I asked it to Joule, our digital assistant. Please check the answer below and confirm it, in case it helps you find a solution.

In SAP BRIM (Billing and Revenue Innovation Management), fetching specific values like Sales Org and Currency during the creation of a Subscription Order using AVC (Advanced Variant Configuration) involves a series of configurations and customizations. If standard tables like CRMS4D_SERV_H, SDCOM, or VCSD_Update are not providing the necessary values, you may need to consider alternative approaches or custom solutions. Here’s a step-by-step guide to address the requirement:

Step-by-Step Process:

1. Check Standard Configuration:

  • Verify Data Model: Ensure your variant configuration model includes all necessary characteristics and additional fields.
  • Review Standard Tables: Double-check that the data in CRMS4D_SERV_H, SDCOM, and VCSD_Update is correctly populated based on the standard configuration settings.

2. Implement Custom Logic:

  • Custom Fields: If you need Sales Org and Currency available, consider adding custom fields to your variant configuration model.
  • User Exit or BAdI: Use user exits, BAdIs, or enhancement spots to incorporate custom logic that fetches Sales Org and Currency during order creation.
    • Example BAdIs: CUAPRODUCT or CUAOBJECT might be useful for custom logic in AVC.

3. Configuration in BRIM:

  • Ensure Integration: Make sure that your BRIM system is set to integrate with AVC appropriately. This involves ensuring that customization settings in BRIM correspond with AVC configuration settings.
  • Mapping: If custom fields are added, map them correctly in BRIM to ensure they are included in the subscription order process.

4. Data Retrieval:

  • Custom Reports/Queries: Develop custom reports or queries, if necessary, to fetch sales organization and currency data from other related tables or external data sources.
  • Use Function Modules: Consider using SAP function modules which can be customized to fetch required data during the subscription order process.

5. Testing & Validation:

  • Simulate Order Creation: Test the order creation process to validate if the Sales Org and Currency are being fetched correctly.
  • Debugging: Use debugging tools to track how data flows during order creation and identify any inconsistencies.

6. Documentation & Training:

  • Document Customizations: Ensure that all changes and customizations are well-documented for future reference.
  • User Training: Train users as necessary to ensure they understand any additional steps or changes in the process due to custom logic implementation.

Additional Considerations:

  • Collaboration with Business Teams: Work closely with business teams to confirm that the solution meets their specific needs.
  • Check SAP Notes: Occasionally new SAP Notes or updates may provide solutions for your requirements, so it's worth checking periodically.
  • SAP Community and Support: Engage with SAP Community forums or contact SAP Support for additional insights and suggestions for your specific scenario.

Implementing custom logic can be complex, so it's recommended to engage SAP professionals or consultants with experience in BRIM and AVC for precise implementation and troubleshooting.

Best regards,

Eduardo

entry.title: Re: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
Hi,
the rule of thumb is - there is no change of DB size, especially in an inplace conversion.
You can reduce the the size by housekeeping only, but that normally happens in the preparation of BW 7.5 for the conversion. 0TCT InfoProviders might consume a lot of data and as those are decommissioned you can expect size reduction of the size consumed by these 0TCT InfoCubes.

KR Frank

entry.title: Elevate Your B2B Strategy: Dive Deep into SAP Customer Data Platform
entry.content:
In an era where data drives strategic decision-making, mastering your ability to effectively manage and utilize customer data is critical. That's why we're thrilled to invite you to our upcoming live session, "Transform Your B2B Strategy: Master SAP Customer Data Platform," where we'll guide you through implementing a comprehensive B2B scenario within the SAP Customer Data Platform.

Who Should Attend?

If you are looking to harness the power of data to optimize your business operations, this live session is tailored for:

  • Business End Users 
  • Technical Consultants
  • Functional Consultants
  • Administrator

What You'll Learn

This session is designed to offer a deep dive into the full array of SAP Customer Data Platform's B2C capabilities within a B2B context. Here’s what you’ll gain:

  1. Ingest and Aggregate Data: Learn how to efficiently ingest data from regions, accounts, profiles, and their activities. Discover methods to aggregate customer information from multiple sources for complete visibility.

  2. Data Privacy Compliance: Understand how SAP Customer Data Platform ensures compliance with data privacy regulations, empowering you to protect sensitive information seamlessly.

  3. Generating Valuable Insights: Explore the dynamic ways to create actionable insights from your B2B data, leveraging analytical tools and techniques to derive valuable customer and market intelligence.

  4. Activating Insights Across Systems: Discover possible ways to activate insights across different destination systems, ensuring that your business leverages data for strategic advantage.

How can you book it?


This live session is available on SAP Learning Hub. You will need to have a subscription.
You can click here to register for this session.

Course Details


Date: May 21, 2025
Time: From 15:00 - 17:00 GMT+2

 

Please Note


For a better understanding of the live session’s content, it’s recommended to also attend the:

    • SAP Customer Data Platform Videos
    • SAP Customer Data Platform C4H630 ILT training
    • Exploring SAP Customer Data Platform Essentials
    • Administrating SAP Customer Data Platform 
    • Developing with SAP Customer Data Platform 

If you have any questions, feel free to add them as a comment to this post.

entry.title: Find the tables that use the structure BAPI_TE_WBS_ELEMENT
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I have recently upgrade an S4 system 2021FPS02 -> 2023FPS03.

SPDD reported that the structure BAPI_TE_WBS_ELEMENT had been modified in the system.
In order to know if a Reset could imply loosing columns in tables, I would like to list which tables do use this structure.

What is the easiest way to find the Tables that uses this structure ?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: Create SAP Build Apps applications in minutes with AI
entry.content:
@SadiqManji thanks! You can easily use it then and enhance it as you want. There are no restrictions to it. It provides you a huge jump start into the app development. Here are some tutorials about it: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-apps-with-sap-build-apps-using-drag-and-drop-simplicity

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/compose-and-automate-with-sap-build-the-no-code-way/presenting-sap-build-apps-at-a-glance

 

@rickysharma thank you as well! Currently, we have this disclaimer: Use of the Gen AI Features will be made available for the restricted period and/or limited to a usage limit, as specified by SAP. To use the functionality provided with the Gen AI Feature beyond this period, you must subscribe to the full commercial version, if and when available.Customer acknowledges and agrees that, due to the time-bound offering of the Gen AI Features, removal of the Gen AI Features will not constitute a material degradation to the SAP Cloud Service, will not be considered as a breach to the Agreement such that Customer’s right to terminate would be triggered under the terms of the Agreement, and Customer shall not be entitled to any other remedy under the Agreement for such removal.

Tracking the usage of such will then be also introduced once the paid version is available.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically embed PDF based on path provided by repor...
entry.content:
Hi Russ,

That is normal, Crystal Reports will only embed the PDF once and load it on Open. Same with Images.

To get this to work dynamically what you need to do is use a database field with the path the PDF file.

Then place the DB field in it's place.

And hit the F1 key to bring CR's help file and search for this:
To make a static dynamic

Don

entry.title: Re: Cost Center mass changes / custom field mass changes...
entry.content: Hi Jeremy,

entry.title: Re: Dimension labels not shown (treemap, heatmap)
entry.content: Thanks, Nikhil. I got your point. However, in this case, the data labels need to be shown and tooltip was what I suggest to the users, too. In my case, the users intend to make a PDF export and have everything inside.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Cloud - BAS issue when fiori app is deployed...
entry.content: Had the same problem. Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3399784 fixed the problem.

entry.title: Reward of Achievement - SAP Lean IX
entry.content:
Team, please let me know if " Reward of Achievement " be provided for these two courses as well, same as " Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP Lean IX "

1. Learning to Use the LeanIX Tool for Successful Enterprise Architecture - 4 Units \ 2 Hours

2. Mastering your ERP Transformation with SAP Lean IX - 12 Units \ 5 Hours

- Thanks

Raj

entry.title: Is it possible to create auto PO and STO both in SAP ME59N ?
entry.content: Client wants ZNB PO to be created from ZNB PR document type and ZUB PO to be created from ZUB PR document type.

entry.title: Re: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content: same situation here for 3 days!!!

entry.title: using selection screen tabbed block how to bind SALV, OOAOV,ALV ??
entry.content:
I Want to Bind ALV to Tabbed block. any suggestion might Help me.

it is not showing in tabbed block, instead it shows in different screen if you click any other tabbed block and come back again.

I am working on an SAP ABAP report that uses a tabbed selection-screen block to display different datasets (e.g., Purchase Orders, Inbound Deliveries, Payment Details, etc.). However, when I use CL_SALV_TABLE to display an ALV report inside a tab, it opens in a new screen instead of displaying within the tabbed block.

Here is the simplified structure of my code:

  • I define selection-screen tabs with subscreens (100–112).

  • When a tab is selected, it should display an ALV report within the same tab.

  • Currently, my ALV grid opens in a new full screen, which is not the expected behavior.

I have tried:

  • Using CL_SALV_TABLE but it does not display inside the tab.

  • Creating a subscreen but struggling to integrate ALV within it.

How can I display the ALV output inside the tabbed block (not a separate screen) using CL_SALV_TABLE or CL_GUI_ALV_GRID?

Any guidance, corrections, or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

DATA: lv_lifnr   TYPE lfa1-lifnr,
      lt_po_data TYPE TABLE OF ekko,
      lt_po_item TYPE TABLE OF ekpo,
      lt_inbound TYPE TABLE OF mseg,
      lt_payment TYPE TABLE OF bseg.

DATA: lo_salv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.

SELECT-OPTIONS: so_vndr FOR lv_lifnr.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF TABBED BLOCK tabs FOR 18 LINES.

  SELECTION-SCREEN: TAB (20) tab1 USER-COMMAND fc1 DEFAULT SCREEN 100,
  TAB (20) tab2 USER-COMMAND fc2 DEFAULT SCREEN 101,
  TAB (20) tab3 USER-COMMAND fc3 DEFAULT SCREEN 102,
  TAB (20) tab4 USER-COMMAND fc4 DEFAULT SCREEN 103,
  TAB (20) tab5 USER-COMMAND fc5 DEFAULT SCREEN 104,
  TAB (20) tab6 USER-COMMAND fc6 DEFAULT SCREEN 105,
  TAB (20) tab7 USER-COMMAND fc7 DEFAULT SCREEN 106,
  TAB (20) tab8 USER-COMMAND fc8 DEFAULT SCREEN 107,
  TAB (20) tab9 USER-COMMAND fc9 DEFAULT SCREEN 108,
  TAB (20) tab10 USER-COMMAND fc10 DEFAULT SCREEN 109,
  TAB (20) tab11 USER-COMMAND fc11 DEFAULT SCREEN 110,
  TAB (20) tab12 USER-COMMAND fc12 DEFAULT SCREEN 111,
  TAB (20) tab13 USER-COMMAND fc13 DEFAULT SCREEN 112.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK tabs.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 100 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 100.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 101 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 101.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 102 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 102.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 103 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 103.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 104 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 104.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 105 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 105.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 106 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 106.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 107 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 107.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 108 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 108.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 109 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 109.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 110 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 110.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 111 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 111.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 112 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 112.

INITIALIZATION.

  tab1 = 'Purchase Orders'.
  tab2 = 'Inbound Delivery'.
  tab3 = 'Payment Details'.
  tab4 = 'Vendor Master'.
  tab5 = 'Goods Receipt'.
  tab6 = 'Invoice Receipt'.
  tab7 = 'Open PO Items'.
  tab8 = 'Closed PO Items'.
  tab9 = 'PO History'.
  tab10 = 'Invoice List'.
  tab11 = 'Payment Status'.
  tab12 = 'Goods Movement'.
  tab13 = 'Supplier Evaluation'.

* Sample code to populate internal tables (would be based on logic)

*  Event handling for tab selection (user command)

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.

*AT USER-COMMAND.
  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'FC1'.  " Tab 1 - Purchase Order Details
      PERFORM display_po_data.
    WHEN 'FC2'.  " Tab 2 - Inbound Delivery
      " Add logic for Inbound Delivery
    WHEN 'FC3'.  " Tab 3 - Payment Details
      " Add logic for Payment Details
  ENDCASE.

FORM display_po_data.
*   Get Purchase Orders based on selected vendor(s)
  SELECT * FROM ekko
    INTO TABLE lt_po_data
  UP TO 30 ROWS.
  TRY.
* Create and display the salv grid
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        IMPORTING
          r_salv_table = lo_salv
        CHANGING
          t_table      = lt_po_data ).

* Set the subscreen area for Tab 1 (Purchase Orders)
* lo_salv->get_functions( )->set_screen( 100 ).  " Set the screen for Tab 1

      lo_salv->display( ).

    CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lx_msg).
      WRITE: / 'Error displaying Purchase Orders: ', lx_msg->get_text( ).
  ENDTRY.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: Unlock the Future: Predicting Customer Behavior with SAP Customer Data Platform AI Workbench
entry.content:
Imagine having the insight to predict your customers’ next move. Whether it's anticipating a potential churn or gauging their engagement levels, understanding customer behavior is invaluable. We invite you to our exclusive live session, "Predicting Customer Behavior with SAP Customer Data Platform AI Workbench," designed to empower you with the tools to foresee your customers' actions.

Session Overview

Join us on May 22, 2025, from 15:00 to 16:30 GMT+2 as we delve into the profound capabilities of the SAP Customer Data Platform AI Workbench. Discover how to create analytic dashboards that reflect potential future customer behaviors by establishing Churn and Customer Lifetime Value models:

  • Forecast Customer Dynamics: Learn to anticipate changes using predictive indicators derived from diverse model runs.
  • Profile and Segment: Utilize insights to categorize customer data into segments, allowing you to respond proactively to predicted behaviors.
  • Harness Pre-trained AI Models: Our session will demonstrate how powerful AI models can analyze customer data in depth to forecast future actions, offering you the ultimate advantage in customer relationship management.

Who Should Attend?

This session is invaluable for anyone keen on transforming customer data into actionable insights, including:

  • Business Practitioners aiming to optimize customer engagement strategies.
  • Technical Consultants looking to integrate predictive analytics into their systems.
  • Data Analysts hoping to leverage AI capabilities for better forecasting.
  • Administrators and Developers keen on enhancing data platform functionalities.

Enhance Your Learning

To make the most of this live session, it would be beneficial to explore these eLearning courses:

  • Explore SAP Customer Data Platform Essentials
  • Administrating Customer Data Platform
  • Developing with SAP Customer Data Platform

Additionally, check out a detailed Technical Blog that guides you on generating sample data to trigger default configurations for SAP Customer Data Platform AI Workbench Churn and Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) models. This blog contains invaluable insights to prepare for the session.

Register Now

Don’t miss this opportunity to leverage AI's predictive prowess in shaping your customer interactions. Secure your spot now at Predicting Customer Behavior with SAP Customer Data Platform AI Workbench Registration.

Event Details

  • Date: May 22, 2025
  • Time: 15:00 - 16:30 GMT+2
  • Virtual Platform: SAP Learning Site

Join us to explore the future of customer behavior prediction and unlock new strategies for customer engagement success!

Stay Informed

Stay updated with the latest insights by subscribing to this blog post. Equip yourself with cutting-edge tools to predict and influence customer behavior efficiently. We look forward to engaging with you and providing valuable updates directly through this platform.

entry.title: Re: Dimension labels not shown (treemap, heatmap)
entry.content: Dear Steffen, yes, indeed this helps in my first example. It would help me even further if the font size would be scaled.

entry.title: Want help to change delivery goods issue status from Completed (C) to not started(A)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have delivery which is 0 in EWM system and the information from EWM to S/4 has be updated as delivery is completed.

Can you please help us with the program which help to change the goods issue status from C to A.

entry.title: ITAB to JSON
entry.content:
Hello together,

I have to itabs and I want to serialze them into one JSON. Itab1 has the following fields (EquiNr, Matnr), itab2 has the following fields (OrderNr, Matnr).

With which class/method can I serialize to JSON that the JSON looks like:

{

"Itab1": [

{
"Equipmentnummer": 547891,
"Materialnummer": "0066897",
},
{
"Equipmentnummer": 547892,
"Materialnummer": "0066897",
}
],


"Itab2": [
{
"FaufNr": 275114221,
"Materialnummer": "00982145"
},
{
"FaufNr": 275114222,
"Materialnummer": "00982145"
},

],

"success": true,
"msg": "ok"
}

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Adding a new column in Duplicate Records of MDG Customer
entry.content: I assume you are referring to the duplicate check pop-up. If that's the case, you can add it to the match profile and enable the match profile-based UI in the configuration settings. This will display the fields from the match profile.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create auto PO and STO both in SAP ME39N ?
entry.content: ME39N - are you sure? The transaction doesn't exist in S/4.

entry.title: Re: Workcenter capacity based on total hours on a period
entry.content:
Hello Johannes,

Thank you very much for your help, we also discovered the "capacity requirement only" feature which seems to meet our requirements.
Official documentation about this feature not easy to find or very detailed based on what I found, so it was a bit of luck finding it.

I'm pretty sure, as you said, taht multiple solutions can be found, however finding it when you are new to SAP can be quite a challenge !

Best regards,
Maxime

entry.title: Issue in MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT
entry.content:
We are converting the plant client to BP using MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT and I came across the error message.
Client 1002567 New CVI_01 Client -> Business Partner Unable to update the relationship data completely.
Has anyone seen this error message?

Thanks.
Vanessa João

entry.title: Re: Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Lea...
entry.content:
Hi Margit,

First, thank you for sharing the links. The links you have shared were part of my research executed already. I have followed these steps. I have a Universal ID created, and it is linked with my personal Gmail ID. The blog is informative, and I have followed exactly the same steps. In fact, I also received the notification about certification expiry in my personal email ID linked to Universal ID only.

The issue I am facing is the lack of professional support from SAP. After purchasing the Learning Hub subscription, I have not received access to the Learning Hub to stay current. I raised multiple SAP support cases (SAP Store Support Request: 1000514192, 1000513592, 1000514103, and 1000514192 + Learning Case Reference 5000130429), but there has been no resolution. In fact, for some, I only get a reply assurance within 24 hours but no actual resolution afterwards. Moreover, there is no contact number to ask for support on this learning hub-related issue, nor an escalation matrix.

Additionally, if you see my post attachment, someone replied that they are not able to resolve, fulfill, and are cancelling the order. However, I have not received any order cancellation email to date. Imagine how unprofessional this is where you buy something, pay for it, someone says the order is cancelled but no cancellation email is received. Now, I don't know whether to place a new order or not.

In addition, I am not able to contact anyone to get help! 'I feel really sad to see how my efforts are being washed out, and this is really concerning.

Can you help me with my case or provide an escalation matrix for Learning Hub-related support, if exists ?

Thank you for your understanding and support.

Best regards,

Monishankar Chatterjee

entry.title: Assignment Basis at Variable Pay Worksheet
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

Is it possible to populate the Assignment Basis into a field in Variable Pay worksheet? We want to be able to see the assignment basis not only in View Details but also to be displayed on the worksheet.

 

 

Your guidance would be helpful.

Thank you in advance,

Olga

entry.title: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content:
Hello all , 

Scenario is like this , i have plant with different MRP storage locations areas , stock now separated with different MRP areas , the issue is when i try to run ATP in sales order if i mention the storage location the system will look only to the stock in related to MRP area for this storge location and if i didn't mention the storge location in sales order the system will look to the stock in the plant excluding all MRP areas

is the there is way to run ATP in sales order in plant level with all the stocks in all MRP areas as well , or a way to run ATP with group of MRP areas in the same time ?

Thanks,

entry.title: delete a folder wrongly created
entry.content: I created a folder at a wrong location and i want to delete it can someone help me on it.

entry.title: Dynamic Workflow BAdI in IF_USMD_SSW_SYST_METHOD_CALLER is not working
entry.content:
Hello

I am implementing a dynamic workflow using a System Method BAdI. I have already created a service name and assigned it as a filter value in the BAdI.

(The other code reads data from the change request and I am only permitted to share the condition code below.) Here is the code within the BAdI:

 CONSTANTS:
    lc_action_approve TYPE usmd_crequest_action VALUE '03',
    lc_action_reject  TYPE usmd_crequest_action VALUE '04'.

*Check MBRSH
  CASE ls_material-mbrsh.
    WHEN 'M'.
      ev_action = lc_action_reject.
    WHEN OTHERS.
      ev_action = lc_action_approve
      .
  ENDCASE.

I have placed a debugger within the code, and I can confirm that the condition is being evaluated. However, after the system processes ev_action (e.g., lc_action_approve), the workflow does not proceed to the next step. Conversely, if ev_action equals lc_action_reject, the M2 step is not triggered.

Thank you!

Best regards,

Rei

Filter ValueNon User agent TableService NameSingle Value Table

entry.title: Re: SAC ODE Story error
entry.content:
Hello,

In my case, this issue was related to the Page Layout definition. The Enable Reporting Layout flag was enabled. Once you activate this option, it cannot be undone. The solution was to create a new SAC report with this flag disabled (the default behavior) and copy every widget.

Regards,

Miquel

entry.title: Re: Cannot publish product - no link to API Business Hub...
entry.content:
I will put this here as it might help some one.

https://johnytips-sap.blogspot.com/2025/03/sap-is-there-is-no-developer-hub.html

entry.title: Re: Using Fiori apps Project Cost Overview and Project Cost Line Items for Project Reporting
entry.content:
Hi @andrea_langlotz ,

Thank you for sharing this information. I am using the app Project Cost Overview (F6991) and the costs only are displayed in global currency. Is it possible to see in another user-specific currencies, correct? Could you give me suggestions to check in the settings to add other user-specific currencies?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Output Management in Purchase Orders: Your Ultimate Guide for Configuration and Troubleshooting
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the same problem as Bruno for multiple links mentioned in this article.

Best regards,

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Error in Report /SDF/RC_START_CHECK
entry.content:
Hello,

Please could you try to check SAPnote 3490700 (https://me.sap.com/notes/3490700). In our case point 3) -> using of report RNGC_CONV_CHECK helped.

entry.title: Re: I have no access to download software for database AS...
entry.content: 16.1 is available on the SWDC. If you cannot see it, please contact your sales representative.

entry.title: ADT Code Completion is Slow
entry.content:
Hello all,

I just started working with Eclipse + ADT and noticed that the code completion is really quite slow. It takes ~ 300ms for the next keyword to show up.

Coming from SE38 this is a HUGE step down, performance-wise and also with regards to the user experience, since in SE38 the next keyword was suggested instantly.

With Eclipse I program twice as slow now, compared to SE38 simply because of the massive wait times I have to endure and because I have gotten used to the snappy-ness of SE38 causing me to press tab before the code-completion pop up had a chance to show up.

Since I can only barely type 'field-symbol' in the time it would otherwise take for the suggestion to pop up, I wonder, is there a quick fix (pun intended) for this, to reduce the pop up times?

I realize, Eclipse does provide this funtionallity, but only for languages such as C++ or Java.

entry.title: Re: Fiori launchpad Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Manage Launchpad Pages - F4512 Standard Application
Manage Launchpad Spaces - F4834 Standard Application

These apps are part of business catalog - SAP_CORE_BC_UI_FLD and standard business role template SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR

entry.title: Automatic welcome mail to new hires
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we are currently doing a new implementation of SuccessFactors Recruiting. We would like to automatically trigger a welcome email after the candidate is hired with some basic information about the company and the first day.

I am running into multiple problems, e.g. it seems regular mails triggered from SuccessFactors do not support (multiple) attachments. Ideally we'd like a welcome mail with attachements to be sent out 30 days before the Hire Date. Does anyone know how we could automate this?

I've been thinking about a regular recruiting template and connecting that with a hired status, but then I have no influence on the trigger. 

Thank you and best regards

Jule

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502.2”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502.2 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

For any feedback you may have, try the Commenting Feature for What's New documentation in this release. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Re: GROW with SAP Learning Roadmap
entry.content: Thanks LuKasz - Are there recommended learning journeys for different profiles i.e Project MAnager, Developers , Application Consultant?

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Hi, it seems that specifically for country FI this might be an issue. Please open an incident to SAP and provide the incident number to me. I will follow it up then from SAP side. BR Markus

entry.title: How do I select from multiple check lots when paying with BCM SAPFPAYM_MERGE
entry.content:
We are implementing BCM for an American Market. They currently use a Custom Classic Payment program to select a check lot from a possible multiple available lots. For BCM, we replace their custom classic payment program with a Payment Medium Workbench  format. We populated the custom classic payment program in an event in the Payment Medium Workbench format. However, the BCM payment program SAPFPAYM_MERGE fails to action selection of the check lot.
Has anybody been able to use multiple check lots in BCM?

entry.title: How to add non-sap system to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

we are planning to add non-sap system to SAP Cloud ALM for health monitoring.

But we are not sure how to add or is it really possible to add non-sap system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add non-sap system to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer,

to enable non-SAP Services and Systems for monitoring with SAP Cloud ALM, follow the instructions for

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/non-sap-services?locale=en-US

Kindly note, currently, the following monitoring application is supported for non-SAP Services and Systems

->>Integration & Exception Monitoring

So it is currently not possible to configure HealthMonitoring for non-SAP Services and Systems.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Exporting SAP Table Data as CSV and ZIP on Application Server using ABAP - A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
​In many SAP projects, there's a frequent need to extract master data or transaction data from the system for purposes such as reporting, data migration, or integration with external systems. A common approach involves exporting this data into a CSV file, compressing it into a ZIP archive, and saving it on the application server for efficient storage and transfer.

This blog post presents an ABAP report that automates the extraction of data from the SFLIGHT table, generates a CSV file, compresses it into a ZIP file, and stores both files on the application server. This solution is particularly useful for scenarios requiring data extraction and compression for streamlined processing.

Business Scenario

Assume you have a requirement to export a list of flight bookings to share with an external partner or to store for auditing purposes. However, due to data sensitivity or storage limitations, the file needs to be compressed before sharing. This ABAP report handles:

  • Reading data from SFLIGHT table
  • Creating a well-formatted CSV file
  • Zipping the file using CL_ABAP_ZIP
  • Writing both CSV and ZIP to the application server

Process Flowchart

Here's an overview of the key steps involved:

  1. Start - Export Process

  2. User Input: File Path & Name

  3. Select Data from SFLIGHT Table

  4. Create CSV String

  5. Save CSV File to Application Server

  6. Convert to XSTRING

  7. Create ZIP using CL_ABAP_ZIP

  8. Save ZIP File to Application Server

  9. Show Success/Error Messages

  10. End - Export Process

 

ABAP Code Sample:  

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report YYCSVZIP
*& Author: Shravankumar Tiwari *
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT yycsvzip.

*** Data Declaratio **
DATA:
  gv_filename     TYPE string,
  gv_filename_zip TYPE string,
  gv_filepath     TYPE string,
  gv_csv_string   TYPE string,
  gv_zip_path     TYPE string,
  gv_xstring      TYPE xstring,
  gv_o_zip        TYPE REF TO cl_abap_zip. "Zip Utility

*** Constant declaration
CONSTANTS gc_zip TYPE char04 VALUE '.zip'.

* Selection screen
PARAMETERS:
  p_path  TYPE string OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '/tmp/' LOWER CASE,
  p_fname TYPE string OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'A_sflight_export' LOWER CASE ##NO_TEXT.

* Exception handling
DATA:
  gs_x_bcs TYPE REF TO cx_bcs.

START-OF-SELECTION.
* Select data from SFLIGHT
  SELECT carrid,connid,fldate,price,currency
    FROM sflight
    INTO TABLE
    (gt_sflight) UP TO 50 ROWS
    ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.                               "#EC CI_NOWHERE

* Prepare CSV header
  gv_csv_string = 'CARRID,CONNID,FLDATE,PRICE,CURRENCY'.

* Add data rows
  LOOP AT gt_sflight ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<gs_sflight>).
    gv_csv_string = gv_csv_string &&
      cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline &&
      |{ <gs_sflight>-carrid }| &&
      |,{ <gs_sflight>-connid }| &&
      |,{ <gs_sflight>-fldate }| &&
      |,{ <gs_sflight>-price }| &&
      |,{ <gs_sflight>-currency }|.
  ENDLOOP.

* Prepare filename and path
  gv_filename = p_fname && sy-datum && sbiw_c_underscore && rsbo_c_suffix-csv.
  gv_filepath = p_path  &&  gv_filename.

* Write CSV file
  OPEN DATASET gv_filepath FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    TRANSFER gv_csv_string TO gv_filepath.
    CLOSE DATASET gv_filepath.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'File could not be created' TYPE 'E' ##NO_TEXT.
  ENDIF.

* Create ZIP file
  CREATE OBJECT gv_o_zip.
  gv_filename_zip = p_fname && sy-datum && sbiw_c_underscore.
  gv_zip_path = p_path && gv_filename_zip && gc_zip.

  TRY.
* Convert string to xstring with explicit exception handling
      gv_xstring = cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_xstring(
        iv_string   = gv_csv_string
        iv_codepage = '4103'     " UTF-8 codepage
        iv_add_bom  = 'X'        " Add Byte Order Mark
      ).
*ADD Adds a File to a Zip Folder
      gv_o_zip->add( name    = gv_filename_zip
                     content = gv_xstring ).

*SAVE Creates a Zip File
      DATA(gv_zip_path_data) = gv_o_zip->save( ).

* Write ZIP file on apllication server
      OPEN DATASET gv_zip_path FOR OUTPUT IN BINARY MODE.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        TRANSFER gv_zip_path_data TO gv_zip_path .
        CLOSE DATASET gv_zip_path.
      ELSE.
        MESSAGE 'Zip File could not be created' TYPE 'E' ##NO_TEXT.
      ENDIF.

** Success messages Output
      DATA(gv_file_message) = | { gv_filepath } { cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline } { gv_zip_path }|.
      cl_demo_output=>display( gv_file_message ).


    CATCH cx_bcs INTO gs_x_bcs.
      " More detailed logging approach
      MESSAGE ID 'ZZZ' TYPE 'E' NUMBER 000
        WITH 'BCS Conversion Error' ##NO_TEXT
        RAISING error ##MG_MISSING.
  ENDTRY.

Example Output

Assuming default parameters and today’s date is 20250331, the output files would be:

  • CSV: /tmp/A_sflight_export20250331_.csv

  • ZIP: /tmp/A_sflight_export20250331_.zip

 

Conclusion

This ABAP code demonstrates how standard ABAP can be used efficiently for file handling, CSV generation, and ZIP compression — all without any third-party tools. It’s ideal for creating reports, system integrations, or any scenario requiring lightweight file exports.

entry.title: Re: SAP RE-FX intercompany lease ?
entry.content: Thanks Andre. Actually I don't have any existing contract type in my environment. I have tried to customize one but I am surprised there's no standard one. Have I missing a BC Set ?

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content:
Hello @Nansy_Matary 

That is how ATP with MRP areas work - see the note 3512644 - ATP Check with MRP Areas and Storage Locations for details. I don't think you can customize that or have ATP across a group of MRP areas.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content:
Hi @harryl 
Regarding the  set time that after failed test

It’s best to wait at most 3 hours past the original booking start time.

Additionally, if you failed the same exam version for three times, it’s not possible to reschedule it.
You need to wait for next release.  
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: ITAB to JSON
entry.content:
The usual suspect is /UI2/CL_JSON: if this is not available or bugged, you may also find the free version released by SAP.

The fieldnames should match the JSON components, an underscore marks the spot where a capital letter should be, like this:

SAP: _EQUIPMENT_NUMBER -> JSON: EquipmentNumber

entry.title: Re: Email change in RCM (candidate profile)
entry.content: Hi. In my experience, if a candidate subsequently changes their email within their candidate profile it only affects where communications are sent.  It doesn't affect the login username/email.  The candidate still has to login using the original email address that they created their account with.  I think SAP is looking to provide more flexibility in the future to update the login username.

entry.title: Re: Unable to see destinations for BPA deployment
entry.content: Awesome, thanks! I had a stale destination there. I updated and it worked 🙂

entry.title: How to get latest records from I_GOODSMOVEMENTCUBE CDS View based on Posting Date
entry.content:
Dear community,

We need a report of material aging, for that we need some material documents with latest posting dates for each material, Can I know how to do this in Custom CDS View?

how to sort in descending order and take top 1 in custom cds view app?

entry.title: Re: FIORI APP Preise verwalten - Verkauf F4111
entry.content: Hello Patrick

entry.title: Re: Function module parameter not found
entry.content:
Maybe you need a member variable of your class. Set this variable at your method. Then addd a method to access the variable. At the function module call this added method.

(If you doesn't create an object of the class change the method and object to class method and class data.)

class lcl_handler definition.
  public section.
...
    methods:
      give_file
        returning value(rt_file) type file_table.
...
  private section.
    data:
      mt_file type file_table.
...
endclass.

class lcl_handler implementation.
...
  method on_hotspot_click.
...
    mt_file = ld_value.
...
  endmethod.
...
  method give_file.
    rt_file = mt_file.
  endmethod.
...
endclass.
function z_ca_get_cluster.
...
  ex_file = lo_object->give_file( ).
" or ex_file = lcl_handler=>give_file( ).
...
endfunction.

Alternatively use an (old style) global variable within your function group (you already have another one - gt_recover?). Set the value to the global variable in the method. Get the value from this variable in the function module.

entry.title: Re: ITAB to JSON
entry.content: Question already asked and answered one hundred times: https://www.google.com/search?q=ITAB+to+JSON%20site:sap.com

entry.title: How to Set up Custom Code Migration App on BTP using CIAS BTP Service
entry.content:
OVERVIEW

Automated setup and configuration in SAP BTP, ABAP environment and Cloud Integration Automation Service application subscription

Technically based on remote ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC)

Analysis of custom code for SAP S/4HANA, SAP BTP, ABAP Cloud,

 Simplified custom code remediation

Obsolete custom code removal based on usage data

Identification of custom code candidates for back-to-standard and redesign Evaluation of custom code for semi-automated adaptation (quick fixes)

Available in SAP BTP, ABAP environment

SAP BTP Cloud Integration Automation 

This service provides you a guided workflow to integrate SAP cloud solutions to on-premises and other SAP cloud solutions. The guided workflow contains instructions for manual and automated tasks to enable an easy and quick integration configuration setup and it multiple advantages as below:

  • It provides the User and task centric approach in integration configuration scenarios, using guided workflows.
  • Planning capabilities to plan an integration scenario
  • The guided workflow covers an integration setup for a specific scenario.
  • Instructions are provided in a task format and can be assigned to a dedicated role.
  • Instructions are provided based on your landscape and the chosen integration scenario.
  • Automated technical configuration steps on selected targets are available and enabled.
  • Monitoring capabilities for the integration scenario guided workflow.

Supported Scenario for the CIAS on CCM Application  :

 

 

System Preparation: Below step need to be executing as initial setup :

  1. Preparing the SAP Business Suite System:
  • Creating the SAP Note Analyzer Report
  • Downloading the Required SAP Notes
  • Implementing the Required SAP Notes
  • Activating the ADT Service Node
  • Creating a System User for the RFC Destination
  • Assigning Permissions to the System User
  1. Preparing the Subaccount for On-Premise Connectivity:
  • Creating a New Subaccount in SAP BTP
  • Providing the Details of the Subaccount
  • Increasing the Quota for the Subaccount
  • Creating the Destination Service Instance
  • Assigning Permissions to the Connection User
  • Connecting the Cloud Connector to the Subaccount
  • Configuring Access Control (RFC) with Load Balancing
  • Configuring Access Control (RFC) without Load Balancing
  • Creating the RFC Destination with Load Balancing
  • Creating the RFC Destination without Load Balancing
  1. Preparing the ABAP Environment
  • Subscribing to the Web Access for ABAP
  • Setting up the ABAP Environment
  • Providing the Details of the ABAP Environment
  • Creating a Business User for Custom Code Migration
  • Enabling the Custom Code Migration Application
  • Integrating the Destination Service Instance
  • Maintaining the CCM Communication Arrangement
  1. Testing the Custom Code Migration
  • Running the Custom Code Migration (ABAP Environment)
  • Running the Custom Code Migration (SAP S/4HANA)

Adding new system for Custom Code Assessment:

Step 1: Add the RFC Protocol for the backend system in Cloud Connector with sap gateway  port as below and import the list of scenarios as required:

Step2 : Create the RFC Destination in the BTP Subaccount

Step 3: We need to define the Select the SAP Business Suit System which is optional and Select the BTP Application ID in the Subscription

 Steps 4: Once we generate the Workflow for Configuring the System Component which includes :

  • Access Option: Can be Via (SAP Logon, Host, Message Server and Router String)
  • Define your Message Server , Host Name
  • External SAP System Name
  • Client number, SID, Instance Number, Logon Group and the installation number .
  • Provide the Cloud connector URL and BTP Subaccount URL

Step 5 : Add the Roles and assign to the users :

 

Step 6 : Define the scope scenario for SAP S/4HANA Migration with Without load balancing

Steps Perform the Smoke Test Run in Web On ABAP Environment :

  • Create SAP S/4HANA Project in CCM Application:
  •  
  • ￼

     

  • Run the Analysis for the system to be analyzed:
  •  

  •  

 

 

  • Now we can check the number the Analyzes findings and validate:

 

  •  

    Conclusion: 
  • Custom Code Migration on BTP saves costs for an extra system and provides permanent access to the new features. Collected usage data can be considered for identification and removal of unused code. Advanced analysis capabilities comprise various dashboards and graphics. Top custom code TCO drivers can be detected as candidates for redesign instead of adaptation

References :

Cloud Integration Automation Service | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: Wrong Deviation Calculation for KPI/DataPoint
entry.content:
After discussing the issue with one of the developers of the framework, a fix was released in the latest patch level 28 (SAPUI5 version 1.120.28). The deviation calculation now behaves as expected again.

See this note to update to a newer patch level: https://me.sap.com/notes/3155948

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2503
entry.content:
Here are the latest features released for SAP Asset Performance Management in 2503. We are pleased to announce significant updates, including Visual Asset Health Monitoring. This release also includes improvements to Manage Rules, Manage Alerts, and Manage Recommendations. 

Asset Health Monitoring

Enable Visual Asset Health Monitoring

SAP Asset Performance Management 2503 enables Visual Asset Health Monitoring. You can elevate your asset management strategy with AI-powered visual inspections.

By collecting and analyzing images of your assets, you can gain real-time insights into their health and predict potential failures before they occur. By documenting asset condition over time, Visual Asset Health Monitoring provides valuable insights into an asset's health and performance. Using AI-powered image analysis, it is possible to measure wear and predict potential failure with greater accuracy. Analyzing images can help identify issues before they lead to operational disruptions. This allows for timely alerts and maintenance notifications, preventing costly downtime and ensuring optimal asset performance. 
(*This is applicable for embedded IoT only)

Key benefits

  • Provides insights into asset health and performance
  • Uses AI-powered image analysis to measure wear and predict potential failure
  • Helps identify issues before they cause operational disruptions
  • Enables timely alerts and maintenance notifications
  • Prevents costly downtime and ensures optimal asset performance
  • Offers potential for improved efficiency, accuracy, and cost-effectiveness compared to manual inspections

For how to leverage Visual Asset Health Monitoring: see Visual Asset Health Monitoring | SAP Help Portal
You can also watch this video : End to end demo of Visual Inspection for Condition Monitoring

Initiate Rule on-demand

You can now initiate a rule on-demand at any point of time, without having to wait for the automated run of the rule as per configurations. To do so, select the desired rule that is in Active status and click on the Run Rule Now button. This button is disabled when you select a rule that is not in active status. Read more on Triggering a ruleThere are more enhancements with Rules.

  • Manage Rule Runs API: The API is enhanced to view rule execution results, including errors, rule details, activation, execution, and involved technical objects. For more information, see Manage Rule Runs API.
  • Initiate Rule through API: To trigger a monitoring or a derivation rule only via API, you can choose the API only option in the Settings. For more information on the API, see Manage Rule Runs API in the SAP Business Acceleration Hub. Triggering a rule through the API can only be performed on-demand.

Navigate to Origin - Rule from Monitor Alerts 

Monitor Alerts in 2503 has been enhanced with a new feature that allows users to easily navigate to the Origin-Rule of alerts. Users can now click on a hyperlink associated with each alert to view the Rule that generated it. This enables quick checks of how Rules are defined and configured so that users can more efficiently investigate and understand why specific alerts are being triggered.

Asset Reliability Engineering

Configure filter options for Priority types in Recommendations

Configuring priority filters in recommendations ensures that users can focus to prioritise the most important tasks, improving decision-making and efficiency. You can activate or deactivate priority types using the Recommendation Settings in the Configuration Manager application. The configured settings will then be reflected in the Manage Recommendations and Implement Recommendations applications, allowing users to filter and manage recommendations based on priority levels.

Enhanced visibility of lifecycle status in Recommendations

In asset management, understanding the lifecycle status of assigned technical objects, maintenance plans, and task lists is crucial for effective decision-making. To improve visibility, recommendations now display lifecycle statuses of these objects, ensuring that potential conflicts are identified and addressed promptly.

Warning icons for quick Identification
To make it easier to spot conflicts , warning icons have been added to both the Recommendation list page and object page. These icons appear in the following scenarios:

  • Technical Objects: If one or more assigned technical objects are with statuses deletion flag or deletion indicator.
  • Maintenance Plans: If a maintenance plan has a frequency mismatch or is in Object Deactivated, Deletion Flag, or Deletion Indicator status. 
  • Task Lists: If a task list has a status other than “Released (General)” or “Released for Order”.

Visual Cues in the Assignments Tab 
Beyond warning icons, visual cues in the Assignments tab help users quickly assess lifecycle status at a glance. By integrating these enhancements, users can efficiently manage assets, reducing the risk of overlooked issues or conflicts, ensuring that recommendations align with the current state of technical objects, maintenance plans, and task list.

  • Technical Objects flagged with a deletion flag or deletion indicator are visually highlighted.
  • Task Lists with a status other than “Released (General)” or “Release for Order”.
  • Maintenance Plans affected by a frequency mismatch, Object Deactivated, Deletion Flag, or Deletion Indicator status are distinctly marked. 

This is the release highlights I prepared for the release 2503. Hope this provides you a good overview. See below for a quick reminder how to keep in touch with us. 

Keep In Touch

  • Check out all past and present Intelligent Asset Management webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. 
  • Check some of our recent blogs:
    • What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2502 - SAP Community
    • Why Failure-Mode Focus Matters in Intelligent Asset Management 
    • SAP Asset Performance Management Embedding Cumulocity IoT to Drive Innovations in IoT and AI
    • How AI-based Anomaly Detection empowers reliability engineers in SAP Asset Performance Management
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

entry.title: Google Jobs delivered by RMK in Schema.org`s specification
entry.content:
Hello,

Google obtains the information for the job box from the structured data of websites. In order for online job advertisements to be listed, this data must be prepared in accordance with Schema.org's specifications. This data is inserted into the head section of the website. Google recommends using the JSON-LD format for this.

When analyzing our jobs in the jobportal some information is available in a structured approach:

  • "title" (the title of the tender)
  • "industry"
  • "datePosted" (the publication date)
  • "description" (the description of the job advertisement)
  • "validThrough" (the expiration date of the job advertisement)
  • "employmentType" (the scope of employment, e.g. "[FULL_Time]" = full-time)
  • "jobLocation" (the address of the place of work)
  • "jobLocationType" (the type of work location; e.g. "[TELECOMMUTE]" can also be entered here if the work is done from home)
  • "hiringOrganization" (the name of the hiring organization)
  • "jobStartDate" (the date from which the position is vacant)
  • "workHours" (the typical working hours)
  • "baseSalary" (the expected base salary)

The information in green is currently provided (automatically) The rest not yet. I would like to check with you, what we must do to have more of the structured information in the job descriptions in our jobportal. 

Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Lea...
entry.content:
Hi @monishankar 
I will bring this to attention to the respective team.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create auto PO and STO both in SAP...
entry.content: If you are a private cloud for S4 -- and you can use ME59N to create the purchase Orders using GUI or as WebGUI enabled by Security--PR and Document type mapping is normally performed in the Purchasing configuration. if you have required master data setup for automatic PO It should work. Are facing any issues setting it up?

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - Filter on Hierarchy node not excluding pa...
entry.content:
For everybody else having this issue. Unfortunately it works as designed:

3399064 - After filtering on child node table displays all parent nodes of the child - SAP for Me

3584513 - SAC table : Wrong behavior when using Input Control filter for hierarchy dimension - SAP for Me

But you can vote for an improvement request here:
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )
entry.content:
@Mahmoud_Wael :

In my case, the requirement is something like this, deep entity type . with Header as Scenario Name, and ITEMS.
For a POST call, i need to take the below given input payload, process it in SAP, and then while returning the response, I need to modify the payload, add some more records to the ITEMS, and then send the response.

My question is, can we achieve this through RAP Odata, by writing some code in DEEP CREATE method. Currently I am facing issue to modify the payload as it is not reflecting in output response (as the Payload both header n items will be importing parameters to DEEP CREATE method, even though i try to add more records in ITEMS in debugging mode, it is not reflecting in output response ). 

Please help me on this.
Input:
{
        "ScenarioName" : "CALCULATION",
        "to_items" : [
            {
              "item_no" : "1",
              "name" : "SERIAL",
              "value" : "123"
            }
          ]
      }

Expected Output:


{
        "ScenarioName" : "CALCULATION",
        "to_items" : [
            {
              "item_no" : "1",
              "name" : "SERIAL",
              "value" : "123"
            },

           {
              "item_no" : "1",
              "name" : "END_DATE",
              "value" : "20250331"
            }

         ]
      }

entry.title: Re: Serial Numbers in SAP MM

@VKR_23 

Fantastic article! Very helpful. Congrats!

Did you try creating a transaction variant and assigning that to your t-code ? I hope below blog would be helpful to restrict selections using transaction variant.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically embed PDF based on path provided by repor...
entry.content: Thanks Don.

entry.title: Re: New Trusted Authentication for Single Server installation and Entra Id
entry.content: I saw that announcement as well. These always have to be evaluated against how Business Objects is used in your installation. Your installation may not have as much vulnerability as what SAP assigns to it. In my opinion, if you don't expose your Business Objects environment outside of your company, you don't have as much vulnerability as you would if you provided outside access.

entry.title: Re: Document change rules, line item in SAP S4H Public cloud
entry.content: Did you use this option to add custom editable fields: App Extensibility: Display and Manage Journal Entries (Key User)

entry.title: Re: #CEO #BA01 How can I specify the posting date for a r...
entry.content: Thanks for your response David. So there is no way to modify posting date for this job or in general? It impacts our DSO calculations and audit as well.

entry.title: Re: Want help to change delivery goods issue status from...
entry.content:
Hi @dyaparakeshreddy19 ,

Could you please help to answer so someone could help you, anso share error screen shot.

Did you try to reverse FDO Outbound Delivery? If yes, What error ? Is it  0 quantity due to process code ? are you using TM with EWM ?

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: SAP EnableNow Producer (10.8.9) can not start
entry.content:
Shane's answer is always correct.

  • If your Producer does not start at all, or crashes when you perform a function, usually your firewall or antivirus is blocking a required file for Producer. 
  • If your Producer (and other programs, probably) starts lagging badly when you perform a function, this is usually caused by unacceptably low network speeds. Check your network connectivity, both on and off of VPN. If you access Producer through a VPN, VPN speeds are usually slower. Below 30 Mbps, video calls will lag noticeably. Below < 10 Mbps, Producer usually freezes.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically embed PDF based on path provided by repor...
entry.content: Thanks Don, your response is appreciated. I believe that I'm doing what you mentioned, I have a database field with the PDF file path. when I search for "to make a static dynamic" CR provided details on how to setup the picture tab using the Graphic Location Format Editor which I'm already doing as you can see in the screenshots above.

entry.title: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am building Time Series (Trend) chart with amount (measure) and date (time dimension) fields in SAC story. We have only 292 days of data. When i created forecast through below menu options, the maximum periods that i can forecast for is 5. I understand that i cant forecast more than 5 periods as i have less data. 

More Options/Add/Forecast/Advanced Forecast

But the 'Forecast Quality' shows score 0/5. 0 means lowest confidence forecast score. 

I have applied all types of forecast available options like  

Automatic, Exponential Smoothing, Linear Regression, Advanced Forecast

But always the 'Forecast Quality' shows score 0/5. 

I am using SAP Datasphere analytical model to build this chart in the story. 

0 score doesnt make any sense. what are the prerequisites i am missing in building the Time Series (Trend) chart. 

I searched online but couldnt find anything relevant/valuable that gives in detail explanation on this chart type.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: I have a pre commitment,which is not yet deleted even after turning it to a PO in another system.
entry.content: We have a pre commitment which will be posted from file to idoc in sap , is not yet deleted even after turning it to a PO in another system.What can be the solution. Do we need to do anything manually?

entry.title: Mass deletion of alternative Units of Measure
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am trying to mass delete Alternative Units of Measure from the product master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the "Manage Mass Maintenance" app. I have included "D", in the "_ACTION_CODE" field in my upload file, and made sure I wasn't deleting the base unit of measure, but I received the following error:

"Deletion not allowed for 'Dimensions' (MARM) or one of its children."

 Is there any workaround to delete an Alternative UOM in mass? 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - Filter on Hierarchy node not excluding pa...
entry.content: Hi Tobias, thanks for gathering these details here. I will mark this as the "solution". Unfortunately we still have to deal with this hierarchy behaviour.

entry.title: Re: PO workflow approval for PPV
entry.content: If there is a purchase price variance for any of the lines in the purchase order , we wanted to trigger a workflow to review the variance. Custom workflow can be done but I am thinking this can be done only if we code the manual calculation to determine PPV. Not sure if there is any other way. Situation handling can trigger an email to the required team which is a good option but it does not trigger an approval workflow

entry.title: HCM Brasil: Exclusivo Evento On-line da SAP sobre o Crédito do Trabalhador (eConsignado)
entry.content:
A SAP tem o prazer de convidar seus clientes e parceiros para um evento online exclusivo, onde apresentaremos a solução da SAP sobre o Crédito do Trabalhador (eConsignado). Este novo sistema de crédito consignado é destinado a trabalhadores com vínculo empregatício ativo e pode ser acessado diretamente através da Carteira de Trabalho Digital, uma iniciativa do Governo Brasileiro.

Quando?

- Dia 05 de maio de 2025

-Horário: Das 9:30 AM até 11:30 AM (Horário de Brasília)

Qual o público-alvo?

- Clientes e parceiros SAP: Este evento é destinado exclusivamente aos nossos clientes e parceiros, que desejam conhecer mais sobre a solução da SAP sobre o Crédito do Trabalhador (eConsignado).

Como me registro?

- Para solicitar sua inscrição acesse esse link e preencha as informações requeridas.

- Sua solicitação será avaliada e você receberá a confirmação ou rejeição por e-mail.

- Só serão aprovadas inscrições com endereços de e-mail corporativo.

O que você pode esperar do evento?

- Visão Geral do Programa: Entenda a perspectiva da SAP sobre esse novo programa do governo, desde a solicitação do crédito até a operacionalização do desconto em folha com os reflexos no eSocial e FGTS Digital.

- Apresentação da Solução: Descubra como a solução SAP pode apoiar empregadores nesta nova responsabilidade, trazendo eficiência e precisão.

- Demonstração: Veja na prática a solução criada pela SAP.

- Perguntas e Respostas: Aproveite para esclarecer todas as suas dúvidas sobre o programa e a solução apresentada.

Participe do nosso evento online e entenda a solução da SAP para esse novo programa do governo.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias.

Um abraço,        

Leandro D’Avila

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content:
@deshmukh 

Forecast quality depends on MAPE or Mean Absolute percentage error. When less historical data is available the quality of forecast is very low. Either increase the historical data or include more forecast inputs. I would suggest that you refer to the below blog which explains the statistical working behind the Time Series Forecasting in SAC.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/your-guide-to-time-series-forecasting-in-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/12868924

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content: Hi, can you please add a screenshot with your data? are you using a classic story or an optimized story? some help links in case this helps https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/76c9d4bb842b4504af627e48ecaa32bb.html & https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/8f9665dcf53f4f3f90e920995cdd5f05.html

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content: You should be able to forecast much more points of data given the size of your historical data...

entry.title: Re: SAP Private Link service use cases for SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Build Work Zone, Standard E
entry.content: @stag_pune SAP BTP is a Internet-facing app by design. SAP Private Link is the only option for hyperscaler specific private networking options by the platform uni-directional from BTP. Some individual SAP SaaS apps implemented further options for VPN or ExpressRoute without BTP as a platform. As it stands today you need to file a feature request to SAP to request further private networking features.

Adriana

entry.title: Re: Dicas de Implementação - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Bra
entry.content:
Olá @claudia_wada.

A licença adicional para desenvolvimentos no framework é necessária apenas em caso de processamento de outros tipos de documentos fiscais (ex: NFS-e, NF3-e, etc)? Ou se o cliente desejar um processo customizado para entrada de NF-e de simples remessa, deverá tambem adquirir a licença?

At.te,
Yuri

entry.title: Intercompany STO and sales configuration
entry.content: I was looking for a configuration documentation for setting up intercompany STO and sales order settings in SAP. The main issue I see is that we cannot have both RE and KR document type setup in OBCE transaction when a billing document is sent. How can we achieve this to ensure that a RE document is posted for a STO and KR for intercompany sales order

entry.title: Re: Dynamically embed PDF based on path provided by repor...
entry.content: Does the URL need to be in a specific format? I'm getting the same results using "F:\Hunting Contracts\HuntMaps\<filename>.pdf" or "\\srv19_rms_dev.cengea.local\C$\Hunting Contracts\HuntMaps\...." Both of these are valid locations

entry.title: Mass creation & upload freight agreements b SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

For a project with transportation management I'm looking for a way to upload freight agreements including rate tebles into SAP Public cloud.

I've looked into the migration cockpit, but there is no object at the moment.

I couldn't find an app either.

How can we achieve this?  There are too many records to manually enter them in the system.

Also for the future, they will require mass maintenance functionality.

thx.

Kind rgrds,

Bart

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content: @mingkho  Sorry I misunderstood the first point in your previous message, my bad. So I followed your advice, I created a filesCount page variable that decreases by "1" after each POST request, adding a condition in order to exit the loop when the filesCount == 0. It seems to be working, many thanks 👍 Of course, don't hesitate to tell me if my logic flow could have been made in a more simple way;)

entry.title: Integrate planned/production orders from SAP ECC to IBP via RTI with different planning plant
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to integrate planned orders or production orders from SAP ECC into IBP using RTI. However, this only works for me if the production plant is the same as the planning plant. If the production plant is different from the planning plant, the orders are not transferred. What can I do to solve this problem?

entry.title: Job Opportunity in Germany for Turkish-Speaking Professionals!
entry.content:
Job Opportunity in Germany for Turkish-Speaking Professionals!

Are you a Turkish citizen with fluent German skills looking for an exciting career opportunity in Germany? Our client is seeking talented individuals to join their team!

Position: SAP MM , SD , FICO , PP Consultants 

Location: Germany (Various locations)

Requirements:

  • Turkish Citizenship
  • Fluent German language skills (both written and spoken)
  • 6 years Experience as an Consultant 

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary
  • Client sponsorship for visa and relocation
  • Opportunity to work in a dynamic and international environment

How to Apply:

Please send your CV  to: sagar.r@dabster.net

Note: Only candidates who meet the language requirements and hold Turkish citizenship will be considered.
